sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e1.user_pseudo_id) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20210109 e1
LEFT JOIN bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107 e2
ON e1.user_pseudo_id = e2.user_pseudo_id
WHERE e1.event_timestamp >= UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-01 00:00:00')
AND e1.event_timestamp < UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-08 00:00:00')
AND e2.event_timestamp IS NULL;

WITH purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    t.transactionId,
    p.productSKU,
    p.v2ProductName,
    p.productCategory,
    p.productPrice,
    p.productQuantity,
    SUM(p.productRevenue) AS totalRevenue
  FROM 
    bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707* s
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.items) p
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.transactions) t ON t.transactionId = p.transactionId
  WHERE 
    p.v2ProductName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
  GROUP BY 
    t.transactionId, p.productSKU, p.v2ProductName, p.productCategory, p.productPrice, p.productQuantity
),
other_purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    t.transactionId,
    p.productSKU,
    p.v2ProductName,
    p.productCategory,
    p.productPrice,
    p.productQuantity,
    SUM(p.productRevenue) AS totalRevenue
  FROM 
    bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707* s
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.items) p
  JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.transactions) t ON t.transactionId = p.transactionId
  WHERE 
    p.v2ProductName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
  GROUP BY 
    t.transactionId, p.productSKU, p.v2ProductName, p.productCategory, p.productPrice, p.productQuantity
)
SELECT 
  op.productSKU,
  op.v2ProductName,
  op.productCategory,
  op.productPrice,
  op.productQuantity,
  SUM(op.totalRevenue) AS totalRevenue
FROM 
  other_purchases op
GROUP BY 
  op.productSKU, op.v2ProductName, op.productCategory, op.productPrice, op.productQuantity
ORDER BY 
  totalRevenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(totals.totalTransactionRevenue) AS total_transaction_revenue, totals.totalTransactionRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231')
GROUP BY _TABLE_SUFFIX
ORDER BY SUM(totals.totalTransactionRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_DIFF(MIN(CAST(_TABLE_SUFFIX AS DATE)), MIN(CAST(_TABLE_SUFFIX AS DATE)), DAY) AS days_elapsed, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue, totals.timeOnSite, totals.bounces, totals.visits, totals.hits, totals.pageviews, totals.newVisits, totals.screenviews, totals.uniqueScreenviews, totals.timeOnScreen, totals.totalTransactionRevenue, totals.sessionQualityDim
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228') AND (totals.transactions > 0 AND _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228')
GROUP BY user_id

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) AS Total Product Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX)) AS Max Daily Product Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX))) AS Max Weekly Product Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX))) AS Max Monthly Product Revenue, hits.product.productRevenue, hits.sourcePropertyInfo.sourcePropertyDisplayName
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630')
GROUP BY hits.sourcePropertyInfo.sourcePropertyDisplayName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor, _TABLE_SUFFIX, totals.hits, totals.pageviews, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731') AND ((totals.transactions >= 1 OR totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL))
GROUP BY CASE WHEN (totals.transactions >= 1 OR totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL) THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non-purchase' END, _TABLE_SUFFIX
ORDER BY _TABLE_SUFFIX ASC

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) AS total_quantity, hits.product.v2ProductName, hits.product.productQuantity
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731') AND (hits.product.v2ProductName IS NOT NULL AND hits.product.v2ProductName != '' AND LOWER(hits.product.v2ProductName) LIKE '%youtube%' AND LOWER(hits.product.v2ProductName) NOT LIKE '%youtube%') AND (hits.product.productQuantity IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY hits.product.v2ProductName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH home_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    MIN(CASE WHEN page.pagePath = '/home' THEN hitNumber END) AS home_hit_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' THEN hitNumber END) AS last_home_hit_number
  FROM
    bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(page.pagePath, '^/home')
  GROUP BY
    session_id
),
next_pages AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    home_hit_number,
    last_home_hit_number,
    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time - hitNumber * 1000) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id ORDER BY hitNumber) AS time_spent_on_home
  FROM
    home_page_visits
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(time_spent_on_home) AS max_time_spent_on_home
FROM
  next_pages
WHERE
  home_hit_number IS NOT NULL AND last_home_hit_number IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_spent_on_home DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH PurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN transaction_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_purchases
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId
),
PageviewData AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId,
        SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE 
            WHEN num_purchases > 0 THEN 'purchase'
            ELSE 'non_purchase'
        END AS purchase_status
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604
    JOIN 
        PurchaseSessions ON bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604.visitorId = PurchaseSessions.visitorId
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId, purchase_status
)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) AS month,
    AVG(CASE WHEN purchase_status = 'purchase' THEN total_pageviews ELSE NULL END) AS avg_purchase_pageviews,
    AVG(CASE WHEN purchase_status = 'non_purchase' THEN total_pageviews ELSE NULL END) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews
FROM 
    PageviewData
GROUP BY 
    month;

SELECT MAX(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(MAX(_PARTITIONTIME), MIN(_PARTITIONTIME), DAY)) AS max_days_diff, device.isMobile
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160901' AND '20170731') AND (device.isMobile = TRUE)
GROUP BY fullVisitorId
